project_type: Java libGDX roguelike game with MVC architecture
build_system: Gradle 8.11 with wrapper (./gradlew). Source in src/ directory. Single sourceSet configured in build.gradle.
test_framework: None - no test infrastructure exists. Verification is done via ./gradlew classes (compilation check)
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew classes and confirm BUILD SUCCESSFUL
setup_instructions: Java 17 is already configured via mise.toml. Just run ./gradlew classes to verify.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - no restrictions. No test framework, no Docker. Verification is compilation-only.
contribution_requirements: Commit to phase2-decouple-logic branch. Push using github Power.
key_patterns: Event-driven architecture with GameEventDispatcher/GameEventListener pattern. CombatEngine is non-blocking state machine. Player extends GameCharacter. Skills defined in SkillTree as static Skill instances. Items use ItemEffect with string stat constants. Sprites generated via Pixmap at runtime in SpriteGenerator. Screens implement com.badlogic.gdx.Screen. Save system uses manual JSON serialization (no external libs). ColorPalette provides consistent NES-style colors.
directory_structure: src/model/ - pure game logic (GameCharacter, Player, Enemy, skills/, items/, status/, events/), src/controller/ - CombatEngine, WaveManager, SaveManager, MetaProgression, GameState, src/view/ - libGDX rendering (screens/, sprites/, effects/, audio/, ui/, rendering/)
